inputs.label: Boiler Horsepower (per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Rated boiler horsepower of a single boiler unit, as per manufacturer specifications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rated boiler horsepower of a single boiler unit, as per manufacturer specifications.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir kazan ünitesinin üretici spesifikasyonlarına göre anma beygir gücü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nenn-Kesselleistung einer einzelnen Kesseleinheit gemäß Herstellerangaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance nominale en chevaux-vapeur (BHP) d'une seule unité de chaudière, selon les spécifications du fabricant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caballos de caldera nominales de una sola unidad de caldera, según especificaciones del fabricante.

inputs.label: Number of Boilers
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical boiler units operating in parallel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of identical boiler units operating in parallel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paralel çalışan özdeş kazan ünitelerinin toplam sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl identischer Kesseleinheiten, die parallel betrieben werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités de chaudière identiques fonctionnant en parallèle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades de caldera idénticas operando en paralelo.

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average operating load as a percentage of full rated capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average operating load as a percentage of full rated capacity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam anma kapasitesinin yüzdesi olarak ortalama işletme yükü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Betriebslast als Prozentsatz der vollen Nennleistung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge de fonctionnement moyenne en pourcentage de la capacité nominale maximale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga operativa promedio como porcentaje de la capacidad nominal total.

inputs.label: Boiler Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall thermal efficiency of the boiler system, based on fuel input to steam output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall thermal efficiency of the boiler system, based on fuel input to steam output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt girişinden buhar çıkışına kadar kazan sisteminin genel termal verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwirkungsgrad des Kesselsystems, basierend auf Brennstoffeinsatz zu Dampfausstoß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement thermique global du système de chaudière, basé sur l'entrée de carburant et la sortie de vapeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia térmica global del sistema de caldera, basada en la entrada de combustible a la salida de vapor.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total number of hours per year the boilers are in operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of hours per year the boilers are in operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazanların yılda toplam çalışma saati sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Stunden pro Jahr, in denen die Kessel in Betrieb sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures par an pendant lesquelles les chaudières sont en fonctionnement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de horas al año que las calderas están en operación.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor (kW per BHP)
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor: 1 boiler horsepower = 9.8095 kilowatts (thermal output).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor: 1 boiler horsepower = 9.8095 kilowatts (thermal output).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm faktörü: 1 kazan beygir gücü = 9,8095 kilovat (termal çıkış).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard : 1 cheval-vapeur chaudière = 9,8095 kilowatts (puissance thermique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar: 1 caballo de caldera = 9,8095 kilovatios (salida térmica).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
